subject: Create standards-reviewer agent
description: Create ~/.claude/agents/standards-reviewer/ with: agent.md (universal code quality, naming, structure, DRY, KISS, documentation), agent.yaml (model: haiku, thinking: true, tier: 1.5, subagent_type: Explore), sharp-edges.yaml (magic numbers, dead code, inconsistent naming, etc), CLAUDE.md. Language-agnostic patterns.
